reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 처음에 흰색 강아지가 삑삑이 소리가 안나서 교환을 했어용ㅎ 상담해주시는 분 굉장히 친절하셔서 기부니가 좋았습니다! 공을 좋아하는 시케는 역시나 정신나간 강아지처럼 물고 뜯고 맛보고를 시전하고 저에게 가져와서 던지라고 그르릉 거려요ㅋㅋㅋ그러면서 안 뺏기려고 흰자보입니다ㅋㅋ바잇미 장난감은 귀엽기도 하고 시케가 좋아할만한것들이 많아서 계속 사게 되네요옹(사실 제가 봤을 때 사고싶다라고 생각해욬ㅋ)
reviews.content_en: At first, the white dog toy wasn't making a squeaky sound, so I exchanged it 😊 The customer service representative was incredibly kind, which made me really happy! Shike, who loves balls, acted like a crazy dog - biting, tearing, and tasting everything lol and then bringing it to me to throw while growling 😂 And she wouldn't let go, showing the whites of her eyes lol BITE ME toys are so cute and there are so many things Shike would love, so I keep buying them (honestly, I think they're things I want for myself lol)

reviews.name: C****
reviews.content:
쫀득쫀득한 강쥐모양 공..🤎 정말 너무 귀엽습니당.
입이 작은 저희집 강쥐는 이친구들 귀부터 공략했어요 ㅋㅋㅋ
통통 튀는게 혼자서도 잘 가지고 놀아서 너무 만족입니당~
reviews.content_en: Chewy puppy-shaped balls 🤎 They're seriously so adorable. My little pup with a small mouth went straight for the ears on these guys lol They bounce around so well that she plays with them by herself all day, so I'm super satisfied~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
바잇미 노즈워크북 앞에 달려있는 인형만 가지고 놀려고하길래 작은 인형을 줘봤어요.
입이 작아서 작은 인형을 선호하는데 아주 찰떡으로 잘가지고 놀아요~
강아지가 강아지를 가지고 논다니ㅠㅠ 너무 귀엽지 않나요!??
간식도 마다하고 장난감에 미쳐있는 귀여운 강아지 보고가세요
reviews.content_en: My pup kept trying to play with just the plush toy attached to the front of the BITE ME nose work book, so I got her a small plush toy. She prefers small toys because her mouth is small, and she plays with it so perfectly~ A dog playing with a dog toy, isn't that the cutest?! 😭 Check out how adorable she is, ignoring treats and obsessed with her toy

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 공러버 강아지 뉴 공장난감 사줬더니 한입에 물고 계속 뛰어댕겼어요! 통통튀는게 좋은지 잘가지고 놀아서 넘 만족입니다🧡
reviews.content_en: I got my ball-loving pup the new ball toy and she grabbed it in one bite and kept bouncing around! She plays with it so well because she loves how it bounces, I'm super satisfied 🧡

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 저희 강아지가 애기때부터 가지고 놀던 삑삑이 시리즈 장난감이에요. 뭐든지 물어뜯고 삼키는 애라서 솜 들어있는 장난감은 항상 조심해야되는데 이 장난감은 솜이 없어서 좋아요. 그리고 크기도 소형견 강아지에게 딱 맞는 크기라서 더 잘 가지고 노네요.
reviews.content_en: This is the squeaky toy series my pup has been playing with since she was a baby. Since she chews and swallows everything, I always have to be careful with toys that have stuffing, but this toy has no stuffing so that's great. And the size is perfect for a small dog, so she plays with it even better.

reviews.name: 진****
reviews.content: 너무귀엽고 한입 사이즈라 물고다니는거 너무 귀여워요ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: It's so cute and the perfect one-bite size, the way she carries it around is adorable 😭😭

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 크기 적당하고 잘 튕겨지고 강쥐가 잘 갖고 놀아요
reviews.content_en: The size is just right, it bounces well, and my pup plays with it really well

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 요것도 추가로 구매 했어요  넘 귀엽다는요
reviews.content_en: I bought this as an additional purchase too, and it's so cute!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요!!!!
reviews.content_en: It's so adorable!!!!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 삑삑이가 빨리고장나는 아쉬움이 있지만.. 울뎅뎅이가 너~무좋아해서 계속 몇개씩 구매중입니다!
reviews.content_en: The squeaker breaks pretty quickly, which is unfortunate... but my Ddengddengi loves it so much that I keep buying several at a time!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
애기가 넘 좋아해요 
기다리는 것도 못할 정도루…😅
더 사줘야겠어요!!
reviews.content_en: My baby loves it so much she can't even wait! 😅 I need to get her more!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 너무좋아해요 하루종일 놀아요.. 인형이 침에 절여져서 축축합니다~~
reviews.content_en: She loves it so much, plays with it all day long... the plush is soaked in drool now~~

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
빠른배송 감사합니다 :)
공모양 삑삑이를 특히 좋아해서
보자마자 홀린듯이 주문했어요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Thanks for the fast shipping :) She especially loves the ball-shaped squeaky toy, so I ordered it as soon as I saw it hehe

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 아주 잘 쓰고 있어요 또 구매하러 올게요~~~
reviews.content_en: We're using it very well and I'll be back to buy more~~~

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 우리집 멍뭉 최애 장난감!! 쟁일라구용!!!
reviews.content_en: My Mengmung's favorite toy!! We're fighting over it lol!!!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 받자마자 아주 잘 가지고 노는중이에요
reviews.content_en: She's been playing with it really well since we got it

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 울뎅뎅이가 가장 좋아하는 공입니다!
reviews.content_en: This is Ddengddengi's favorite ball!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
파괴왕 강아지인데 아직까지 잘 버텨주고 있어요
비록 꼬질해졌지만요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My pup is a destroyer of toys but this one is still holding up well so far even though it's gotten a bit dirty hehe

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 저히 강쥐가 넘 조아해요
reviews.content_en: My little pup loves this so much

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 역시 잘 갖고 놉니다. 생각보다 탄성이 있네요.
reviews.content_en: As expected, she plays with it really well. It has more bounce than I expected.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 강아지가 좋아해요 던지기에도 좋은 사이즈에요
reviews.content_en: My pup loves it and it's a great size for throwing

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
강아지가 좋아해요
달려있던 흰 태그는 하루만에 뜯어서 씹어 드셨어요..
reviews.content_en: My pup loves it and she ripped off the white tag that was attached in just one day and chewed it up..

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 저희 강쥐가 이런 작은공 같은걸 조아해요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My little pup really likes this kind of small ball hehe

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 좋습니다 자주이용하겠습니다
reviews.content_en: It's good, I'll use it often

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
잘 갖고 놀아요
감사합니다
reviews.content_en: She plays with it well, thank you

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 하나씩 뜯어주려고 샀어요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I bought it so she could tear apart the toys one by one hehe

reviews.name: 소****
reviews.content:
아... 반나절만에 속살을 드러냈어요... 슬픕니다 ㅠㅠ  작아서 잘 갖고 놀긴하는데
뜯어버리네영 ㅜㅜ
reviews.content_en: Ugh... it showed its inner stuffing in just half a day... so sad 😭 She does play with it well because it's small, but she tears it apart 😭

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
진짜 저희강아지 이공만 1년째 쓰고있는데
애견카페가면 다른강아지들도 넘 좋아해서
뺏길정도로 좋아요

공의크기나 말랑함 삑삑이 
아이들이 물었을때 너무 딱딱하지않아서
소형견아이들한테 딱이에요!

다만 침이나 흙 잔디에 금방 더러워져요
물에씻으면 바로 깨끗해지긴합니다
reviews.content_en: My pup has actually been using just this one ball for a year now, and when we go to the dog cafe, other dogs love it so much they try to steal it! The size of the ball, how soft it is, the squeaker - it's not too hard when the pups bite it, so it's perfect for small dogs! The only downside is that it gets dirty quickly from saliva, dirt, and grass, but it gets clean right away when you wash it in water

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
삑삑이에 환장한 강아지
두마리가 있는데, 주고나면 바로 킬해버리거든요ㅜㅜ30분이면 쓰레기통에 가있어요ㅠ근데 바잇비는 인형으로 된거라 빵꾸는 나도 한달은 갖고놀아여ㅋㅋㅋ그래서 바잇미 삑삑이가 비싸도 전 제일 좋아여 
다양한 디자인으로 많이만들어주세연ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I have two dogs obsessed with squeaky toys, and they destroy them right away once I give it to them lol In 30 minutes it's in the trash 😭 But since BITE ME's is made with a plush, even I can't puncture it and they play with it for at least a month hehe That's why I like BITE ME's squeaky toys the best even though they're pricey. Please make more with diverse designs hehe

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 저희집 강아지가 진짜 너무너무 좋아해요ㅠㅜ바일미는 항상 내구성듀 좋고 맘에들아요ㅠㅜ항상 신상나옹때마다 사요ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: My pup really really loves it so much 😭😭 BITE ME always has great durability and I love it 😭😭 I buy it every time they release new items 😭😭

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 크기가 작고 딱딱하지 않아서 좋아요. 적당히 튀어오르는 공이라 꾸준히 잘 쓰고 있어요
reviews.content_en: The size is small and it's not hard, which is great. It bounces nicely so my pup plays with it all the time!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 저희 멍멍이가 아주 좋아합니다. 천이 다하면 삑삑이 공으로도 활용할 수 있어 더 좋고요.: )
reviews.content_en: Our doggy absolutely loves it. It's even better because when the fabric wears out, it can still be used as a squeaky ball :)

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 공 너무 귀여워요 >_<
reviews.content_en: The ball is so cute >_<

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
너무귀여워요 저희강아지가
좋아해요
reviews.content_en: It's too cute! Our dog loves it

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 저희 강아지가 꼭 동그란 인형모양 장난감만 좋아하해서 샀어요! 고무 공밖에 없어서 찾기힘들었는데 인형 모양이고 안에는 공이라서 놀아주기 정말 좋네요
reviews.content_en: My dog only likes round plush toy-shaped toys, so I got this one! It was hard to find since there were only rubber balls, but this is shaped like a toy with a ball inside, so it's really fun to play with!

reviews.name: 라****
reviews.content: 비슷한 개구리가 있었는데 너무 잘 놀아서 더 구매했어요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: There was a similar frog toy that my dog played with so well, so I bought more ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 너무  좋아해서  공만  6개  구매했어요
reviews.content_en: My dog loves it so much I ended up buying 6 of these balls!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 이슬이가 이 공시리즈를 너무 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: Eul-sil absolutely loves this ball series!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 너무너무너무조아요 또사려구요
reviews.content_en: I love it so much I'm going to buy more!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 입 작은 소형견 강아지들도 잘 가지고 놀아요!
reviews.content_en: Even small breeds with small mouths play with it well!

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 귀여운 삑삑이~~ 강아지가 좋아해요^^
reviews.content_en: Such a cute squeaky ball~~ My dog loves it ^^

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
바이ㅛ미 공인형 장낭감 다있는데
역시 이것두조아해용 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: We have all the BITE ME ball plush toys, and of course this one is a hit too ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여운 강아지 두마리 우리 아기랑 잘놀아요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Two of our adorable pups play with it so well with our baby ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 아이가 잘 가지고 놀아요 애착!
reviews.content_en: The baby plays with it a lot! Very attached to it!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
잘  가지고 놀아요
좋아 해요
reviews.content_en: Plays with it well. Really loves it!
